Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: The ordering ID used to sort this part in the menu.

Fields.Name: Wandering Equip ID
Fields.Description: Replacement equipment ID for wandering ghosts.

Fields.Name: Vagrant: Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: The item lot to use when this item is dropped and generates a vagrant.

Fields.Description: The item lot to use when this item is dropped and generates a vagrant.

Fields.Name: Evil Vagrant: Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: The item lot to use when this item is dropped and generates a vagrant.

Fields.Name: Repair Price
Fields.Description: Soul cost for repairing this item.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Price
Fields.Description: Soul cost of reinforcement. See ShopLineupParam for shop prices.

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: The price when this item is sold. Determines the souls received when feeding this weapon to Frampt

Fields.Description: The ID this item uses for world tendency.

Fields.Description: The model ID to use for this equipment.

Fields.Description: The icon ID to use for the male gender version.

Fields.Name: Knockback
Fields.Description: The knockback reduction value for this equipment.

Fields.Description: The knockback repulsion value for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Durability
Fields.Description: The initial durability for this equipment.

Fields.Description: The maximum durability for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: The poise durability for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Defense
Fields.Description: The weapon repulsion defense for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Defense: Physical
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified type.

Fields.Name: Defense: Magic
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified type.

Fields.Name: Defense: Fire
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified type.

Fields.Name: Defense: Lightning
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified type.

Fields.Name: Defense Correction: Slash
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier to apply to physical defense when struck with slash damage. Example: -50 = -50%, 50 = +50%

Fields.Name: Defense Correction: Strike
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier to apply to physical defense when struck with strike damage. Example: -50 = -50%, 50 = +50%

Fields.Name: Defense Correction: Thrust
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier to apply to physical defense when struck with thrust damage. Example: -50 = -50%, 50 = +50%

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Poison
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Toxic
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Bleed
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Status Resist: Curse
Fields.Description: The flat defense value for this equipment for the specified resistance type.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement Type ID
Fields.Description: The reinforcement progression to use for this equipment.

Fields.Name: Achievement ID
Fields.Description: The achievement ID this part is associated with, if any.

Fields.Name: Shop Level
Fields.Description: Level that can be sold at the store

Fields.Name: Knockback Parameter ID
Fields.Description: The knockback parameters to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Repulsion Damage Absorption %
Fields.Description: The absorption rate to use when calculating the repulsion damage this part incurs.

Fields.Name: Model Category
Fields.Description: The equipment model category used by this part.

Fields.Name: Model Gender
Fields.Description: Gender of equipment model

Fields.Name: Equipment Category
Fields.Description: The equipment category for this part.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound
Fields.Description: The sound used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle
Fields.Description: The particles used when guarding.

Fields.Name: Parts Damage Type
Fields.Description: The type of attack that applies parts damage.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Sound (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The sound used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Defense Presentation: Particle (on Weak Point Damage)
Fields.Description: The particles used when weak point is damaged.

Fields.Name: Can Deposit
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be deposited into the repository.

Fields.Name: Is Helm Equipment
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered Helm equipment.

Fields.Name: Is Chest Equipment
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered Chest equipment.

Fields.Name: Is Gauntlet Equipment
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered Gauntlet equipment.

Fields.Name: Is Legs Equipment
Fields.Description: If ON, is considered Legs equipment.

Fields.Name: Use Facescale
Fields.Description: If ON, this part applies face scaling.

Fields.Name: Is Drop Disabled in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: If ON, this item cannot be dropped in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Simple Model for DLC
Fields.Description: If ON, there is a simple model for DLC.

Fields.Description: The ordering ID used to sort this part in the menu.
